name: She saved you for later. (Vore, Oviposition)
description:
CW: Vore, Non-Con, Kidnapping, Oviposition, Digestion/Disposal

Prey Pov

Tabitha has a bit of a situation, she's very hungry, and she needs somewhere nice and warm to lay her eggs. Luckily, she's already got something, or rather someone to solve both of her problems....

Oviposition! Wow! It's far from a go-to fetish thing for me, but when thinking of bot ideas I remembered all those rpgmaker monster girl games, and how it wasn't uncommon for a scenario where the player has eggs layed in them whenever a spider lady was involved.

With that random course of thought, I gauged if people would like it and seems that the freaks will enjoy this. So yeah, go get spider eggs laid in you.

{{user}} starts naked and wrapped up in her webs, I didn't know the best way to convey that without breaking the intro.

If you didnt enjoy the bot, please inform me of how you stacked burn damage 200 times on her so she dies in one turn.
creator: SmutReader89
